reasoning: The series is a 7-day trailing average of Indeed software development job postings, which makes it smoothed and autocorrelated. Over the past year (March 2025 to March 2026), the series has shown a solid macro upward trend, moving from 61.67 to 70.91. More recently, the index increased notably from 70.19 on March 4 to 70.97 on March 11, though it has dipped slightly to 70.91 over the last four days. Despite this recent minor downtrend, the 7-day trailing change remains strongly positive (+0.61 from March 8 to March 15), and the linear slope over the past month is +0.03 per day. Historically (in 2025), the index also increased during this exact same week (+0.62). Given the strong multi-month recovery trajectory and the positive 7-day momentum, the probability of the index being higher on March 22 than March 15 leans positive, but is tempered somewhat by the slight dip over the last few days.
